title: Real knife
description: This module is inspired by the weapons in 《undertale》.
body:
This mod is inspired by the weapons in the original "Under the Legend" "Real Sword"

After joining the mod, you need to find the structure called "undertale:ut" in the meadow biome from -50 to -51 squares, then find the "metal ingot" in the chest, and finally use the quiet armor pattern Netherite sword metal ingots in the forge to make the "real knife".

Based on the "real sword" in "Under the Legend", when the player's LV rises, the damage points will also increase. So I set the "real knife" in the mod to damage = player level.

=)

3.14159265358979
